0level.name: baba is you
0level.note: Push the center rock column right until Baba reaches the flag.

1level.name: where do i go?
1level.note: Break WALL IS STOP, move the lower IS to FLAG IS, move WIN into place, then touch the flag.

2level.name: still out of reach
2level.note: Push the rocks out through the gap, use the words to break SKULL IS DEFEAT, then walk down to the flag.

3level.name: out of reach
3level.note: Sink one rock to open the water exit, move ROCK onto FLAG IS WIN to make ROCK IS WIN and break ROCK IS PUSH, then step onto the remaining rock.

4level.name: pillar yard
4level.note: Push a three-pillar chain so one pillar sits on the flag, then build vertical PILLAR IS YOU while preserving BABA IS YOU.

5level.name: off limits
5level.note: Break WALL IS STOP, turn WALL IS YOU on, then move the controlled wall up into the flag.

6level.name: grass yard
6level.note: Treat WALL as empty, move BABA IS YOU to x=14..16, build vertical FLAG IS WIN at x=15, then step onto the real flag.

10level.name: affection
10level.note: Move the MOVE text into LOVE IS PUSH to form LOVE IS MOVE, wait until love moves below the tree cage, break LOVE IS MOVE, then step down onto the stopped love.

20level.name: icy waters
20level.note: Break BABA IS SINK by pushing SINK down, push WALL text right and then up into the bottom-center fungus, then enter the opened flag pocket.

90level.name: volcano
90level.note: Keep BABA IS YOU connected by pushing the whole rule left once, move the rock to open the lower passage, build LAVA IS PUSH, push the lava row aside, then touch the flag.

93level.name: brick wall
93level.note: Leave WALL IS STOP alone, keep BABA IS YOU, move IS and WIN under BABA to form vertical BABA IS WIN.

189level.name: now what is this?
189level.note: Break FLAG IS STOP, move WIN to the right of the upper IS, move FLAG to the left of that IS to form FLAG IS WIN, then touch a flag.

209level.name: lock
209level.note: Use both keys for the first two shut doors, move ROCK text into the key rule corner to make ROCK IS OPEN and ROCK IS PUSH, then push the rock into the last door and walk to the flag.

212level.name: turns
212level.note: Use rocks plus ROCK IS PUSH AND SINK to clear star/skull, move AND above BABA IS YOU to make HAND AND BABA IS YOU, then move hand to flag.
